title: Cobblemon Utility+ (IVs, EVs, & More)
description: Adds utility items to Cobblemon for a better experience
body:
## DATAPACK NO LONGER REQUIRED FOR RECIPES

### [No Recipe Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-utility-ivs-evs-more-no-recipes)

### Don't use with Brendon's Bottlecaps

## **Bottlecap Items (IV Boosters):**

**Golden Cap - Boosts all IVs to max**

**Silver Caps - Boosts particular IV to max**

**Wooden Cap - Randomizes IVs**

**Void Cap - Sets IVs to 0**

**Obsidian Caps - Sets Particular IVs to 0 (v1.6)**


## Additional Items:

**Shiny Card - Switches a Cobblemon's shiny status**

**Ball Synchronizer - Changes the Poké ball to the Poké ball in the Cobblemon's item slot**

**Transmutation Orb - Switches a Cobblemon's gender if applicable**

**Void Feather - Sets EVs to 0**

**Poké Treat - Increases Friendship (v1.1)**

**Common Candy - Decreases level by 1 (v1.1)**

**Stale Poké Treat - Decreases Friendship (v1.2)**

**Devolution Relic - Devolves a Cobblemon (v1.3)**

**Master Candy - Sets level to 100 (v1.4)**

**Cobblemax - Maxes a Cobblemon's level, IVs, and Friendship (v1.5)**

**Cobblemin - Minimizes a Cobblemon's level, IVs, and Friendship (v1.5)**

## Other Additions:

**EV Feathers given recipes in [datapack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/cobblemon-utility-recipes)**


Support available in the Cobblemon Discord #content-zone-help

No Recipe files are available in the support thread
